prompt: Procesa todos los documentos del directorio y genera los archivos de priming RAG correspondientes.
expected_behavior: Lists all unprocessed documents in working directory
Checks calibration-digest.md to skip already-processed files
Reads each document and applies correct extraction strategy
Generates one priming file per document in references/priming-rag/
Each priming file has TL;DR, Key Entities, Constraints, Evidence
Updates calibration-digest.md with new priming level
Reports summary: N docs processed, N priming files generated, new level

prompt: Acabo de subir un PDF del curriculo de Ciencias Naturales 5to EGB. Genera el priming RAG para este documento.
expected_behavior: Identifies the new PDF as curriculum type
Reads the PDF (first 20 pages if large)
Extracts destrezas, indicators, competencies, grade mapping
Tags all extracted content with [CODIGO] or [DOC] evidence tags
Updates calibration level if threshold crossed

prompt: Re-process the HTML deliverable file — it was updated since the last priming run.
expected_behavior: Identifies the HTML file as already processed
Updates existing priming file instead of creating duplicate
Extracts updated architecture decisions and process flows
Notes what changed vs previous version
